name: Minature Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (163°C).
2. In a small bowl, mix together the graham cracker cereal and sugar.
3. Add the melted margarine and ground graham cracker crumbs to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
4. Press the crumb mixture into the bottom of each muffin cup lined with paper liners, filling them about 2/3 full.
5. Bake for 5 minutes at 325°F (163°C), or until lightly golden brown.
6. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, lemon juice, lemon peel, and vanilla extract until smooth.
7. Add the egg to the mixture and mix until well combined.
8. Pour the filling into each cooled muffin cup, filling them about 3/4 full.
9. Return the filled muffins to the oven and bake for an additional 25 minutes at 325°F (163°C), or until set.
10. Allow the cheesecakes to cool completely before removing from the pan.
11. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving.
12. Garnish with fresh fruit, strawberry preserves, or apricot preserves just before serving.
Make Ahead:
Wrap each cooled cheesecake individually in plastic wrap and store in the freezer. Allow them to come to room temperature for 40 minutes before garnishing and serving.
